VALUES ('9b6dc5c0-44fc-414d-a425-bdf8f0be8db6', 'Which choice best states the main idea of the passage?', 'Passage 3: Scientists observed that species in region 3 adapt quickly when temperatures shift by even a few degrees.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"Local species can adapt when temperatures change slightly","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Supported by the passage."},{"id":"B","text":"Temperature never affects species","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicted."},{"id":"C","text":"The passage lists every species on Earth","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Too broad."},{"id":"D","text":"Scientists refuse to study climate","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Not stated."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage focuses on quick adaptation to small temperature shifts.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Words in Context', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'WIC', NULL, 'hard', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_template_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

VALUES ('6e5fd353-4108-40a6-8d81-c8e9aad78cb0', 'Which choice best states the main idea of the passage?', 'Passage 3: Scientists observed that species in region 3 adapt quickly when temperatures shift by even a few degrees.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"Local species can adapt when temperatures change slightly","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Supported by the passage."},{"id":"B","text":"Temperature never affects species","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicted."},{"id":"C","text":"The passage lists every species on Earth","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Too broad."},{"id":"D","text":"Scientists refuse to study climate","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Not stated."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage focuses on quick adaptation to small temperature shifts.', NULL, 'Expression of Ideas', 'Rhetorical Synthesis', 'reading_writing', 'expression', 'SYN', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_template_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
